heading: Try an Example for the dateFacet Type
body:
The following index definition example uses the sample\_mflix.movies
collection. If you have the [Load Sample Data Into Atlas](sample-data) already
loaded on your cluster, you can use the Visual Editor or JSON (Javascript Object Notation) Editor
in the Atlas UI to configure the index. After you select your
preferred configuration method, select the database and collection,
and refine your index to add field mappings.

**Sfeg1:**

stringFacet Type Example

The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies`
collection in the [sample data sets](available-sample-datasets) indexes the `genres` field as
`stringFacet` for faceting.

**Vib:**

Visual Editor

- In the **Add Field Mapping** window, select
  **genres** from the **Field
  Name** dropdown.

- Click the **Data Type** dropdown and select
  **StringFacet**.

- Click **Add**.

**Jsonib:**

JSON Editor

```json
{
  "mappings": {
    "dynamic": false,
    "fields": {
      "genres": {
        "type": "stringFacet"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

**Sfeg2:**

Multiple Types Example

The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies`
collection in the [sample data sets](available-sample-datasets) indexes the `genres` field as
`stringFacet` and `string` types to return the following
types of results for your queries:

- Metadata results for queries using MongoDB Search [faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref).

- Search results for queries using MongoDB Search operators like
  [text](text-ref), [Phrase](phrase-ref), and other operators that
  perform text search.

**Vib:**

Visual Editor

- In the **Add Field Mapping** window, select
  **genres** from the **Field
  Name** dropdown.

- Click the **Data Type** dropdown and select
  **StringFacet**.

- Click **Add**.

- Repeat step **1** and select **String** from the
  **Data Type** dropdown.

- Review the default setting for **String
  Properties** and click **Add**.

**Jsonib:**

JSON Editor

```json
{
   "mappings": {
      "dynamic": false,
      "fields": {
         "genres": [
            {
               "type": "stringFacet"
            },
            {
               "type": "string"
            }
         ]
      }
   }
}
```
